folio.label: 103v
folio.l: But to Grisilde a geyn , I wol me dresse
And telle hire constaunce , and hire besynesse
¢ Ful besy was Grisilde , in euäy thyngö
That to the fest , was ¹tynent
Rigút nougút was she a bayst , of hire clothyngö
Thougú it were rude , and somdele eke to rent
But witú glad chere , to the ©ate is she went
Witú othere folk , to grete the Markysesse
And after that , dotú fortú hire besynesse
¢ Witú so glad chere , hise gestes she resceyued
And so konyngly , euericú in his degree
That no defaute , noman ¹ceyued
But ay they wondren , what she be
That in so poore aray , was for to se
And coude swicú honoå , and reuerence
And worthily they preisen , hire prudence
¢ In al this mene while , she ne stynt
This Mayde , and eke hire brother , to comende
Witú al hire herte , in ful benigne entent
So wel , that noman coude , hire pris amende
But at the last , whan that theise lordes wende
To setten he~ doun to mete , he gan to calle
Grisilde , as she was besy , in the halle
¢ Grisilde q¶ he , as it were in his pley
How lyketú the my wyf , and hire beaute
Rigút wel q¶ she , my lord , for in good fey
A fairere saw I neuäe noon , than she
I preye to god , ©eue hire ¸s¹ite
And so hope I , that he wyl to ©ow send
Plesaunce I now , vn to ©oure lyues end
¢ O thyngö byseke I ©ow , and warne also
That ©e ne pryke , w no turmentynge
This tendre Mayde , as ©e han don moo
For she is fostred , in hire norisshynge
More tenderly , and to my supposynge
She coude nat , aduäsite endure
As coude a poore , fostred creature
¢ And whan this Waltä , saugú hire pacience
Hire glad chere , and no malice at al
And he so oft , had don to hire offence
And she ay sad , and constau~t as a wal
Contenuyngö euäe , hire Innocence ouäal
This sturdy Markys , gan his hert dresse
To rewe vp oon hire wyfly , stedfastnesse
¢ This is I now , Grisilde myn q¶ he
